stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Which statement is correct regarding the status of the autopilot and flight director?

options.a: The autopilot is engaged and is conducting an autoland. The flight director is giving flight guidance as a backup.
options.b: The flight director is engaged on the ILS, the autopilot is primed for engagement for the flare.
options.c: Number 1 autopilot is engaged on the ILS, Number 2 autopilot will initiate the land.
options.d: The autopilot is engaged and is on the ILS. The flight director is not engaged.
